videos.title: The 3 Levels of Physical Products to Sell
videos.description:
Most creators stop at “useful.”

But most forget there's an opportunity that's even greater for your superfans.

If strangers get it immediately, it’s probably Level 1.

Wait until you see what Level 3 looks like.

#Shopify #ecommerce #creator

videos.title: The Marketing Move That Made Our Kickstarter Launch Work
videos.description:
If you wait until launch day to talk about your product, you already waited too long.

The most effective marketing happens before you are ready.

This is the one shift we made that changed everything for our physical product launch.

Try it for your next physical product or merch drop.

Also check out the challenge to set up your Shopify store in just 5 days here: http://www.smartpassiveincome.com/store

#marketing #ecommerce #shopify

videos.title: Live is the last human platform.
videos.description:
Join me at 9am PT (12pm ET) for a live Q&A and celebration now that we completed the 7-day Live Streaming Video challenge! Well done to all participants, whether you created all 7 videos, or even just one!

I'll be live on YouTube at 9am PT, 12pm ET. See you then!

#YouTubeLive #LiveStreaming #ContentCreator

videos.title: He said my name.
videos.description:
If you live stream, please do this little thing. It can make someone's day!

Shout out to Darren Rowse from ProBlogger for being a huge inspiration for me all those years ago!

#livestreaming #contentcreator #audienceengagement

If it were easy, what would it look like?
